title: El rey de los Gitanos
writer: Paul Perez, Llewellyn Hughes, José López Rubio
actors: José Mojica, Rosita Moreno, Julio Villarreal
plot: A princess escapes her stuffy Grand Duke fiance and goes incognito to a carnival where she meets the gypsy king.The Duke punishes him for flirting with her and continues to fight for her affections.
